name: Clawd Grok Sandbox Computer

cli_package.name: clawd-grok
cli_package.description: Grok-powered Solana terminal agent for perps research, MCP workflows, wallet/payment utilities, OpenTUI, Telegram automation, and safe paper-first trading.

holder_gate.proof: Fresh wallet-signed message verified server-side with Ed25519 before E2B Sandbox.create()

operator_commands.prompt: npm run e2b:clawd-grok -- --prompt "Summarize the Clawd Grok environment" --pass-provider-keys --keep

trust_boundaries: E2B is the outer sandbox computer; Clawd Grok's inner Shuru sandbox is not forced because it is macOS-arm64 specific.
Every real site launch requires a wallet-connected, freshly signed proof from a Solana address holding at least 1,000 $CLAWD.
Provider keys are never forwarded into a sandbox unless the operator explicitly passes --pass-provider-keys or the site deployment enables CLAWD_GROK_FORWARD_PROVIDER_KEYS.
Wallet private keys, seed phrases, and signing material are not forwarded by the launcher.
Public site launch is fail-closed until E2B_API_KEY and CLAWD_GROK_SANDBOX_ENABLED=true are configured server-side.

public_site_adapter.description: 8 Bit Labs launch surface for a disposable Clawd Grok sandbox computer. It presents the safe plan publicly and only executes when server-side E2B credentials and launch gates are enabled.
